How long have you worked here?
Nice to meet you. I am James Carter, the People Director here in Australia.
It is a pleasure, James. I am Murielle, an HR business partner at Minerva Foods.
Great. How long have you worked in HR?
I have worked in HR for over twelve years, and I have been with Minerva since 2019.
Impressive. What is your main area of expertise?
My expertise is people development. I have also taken on several international projects.
Have you ever worked abroad?
Not yet, but that is my goal. I report to the VP of People here in Brazil.
Wonderful. Let us keep in touch. Our teams will work closely this year.
Hi, I am Murielle. It is a pleasure to meet you.
I have worked in HR for over twelve years.
I report to the VP of People and lead a small team.
My expertise is people development and talent.
It has been a pleasure. Let us keep in touch.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to our global HR alignment call. I'm James, the People Director here in Australia. We've prepared a short agenda for today. First, we'll review the headcount and the latest turnover figures. Then we'll look at the new hiring plan for the local team. We have partners joining from Brazil, Chile, and the Middle East, so please introduce yourself before you speak, and tell us how long you have been with the company. If you've already sent your reports, thank you — we've received them. Let's make this a productive session.

Hi Murielle, it's Sarah from the corporate team. I'm calling about the people review next week. It has been moved to Thursday at two o'clock, and the call will be in English, since our Australian colleagues have joined the project. Could you bring your turnover numbers and a short update on your team? I've already shared the agenda by email, so please take a look when you have a moment. It's a quick meeting, about thirty minutes. Let me know if that time works for you. Thanks, and talk soon.
